title: Craiova、Dolj — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Craiova、Doljの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

CraiovaはDoljにある人口269,506の都市です。A major economic center in Oltenia, known for its beautiful botanical garden, historic old town, and a growing automotive and aerospace industry.
